controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
1 These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issue
controls.control_description: 2 These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'), for all la
controls.control_description:
Applicability
3 These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial Companies
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'), for all
layers unless specified otherwise:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'), for all la

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to cics registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
4 These Directions, except Chapter III, shall be applicable to CICs registered with the
RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to cics registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them below
controls.control_description:
Definitions
6 In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meaning assigned to them below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them below

controls.control_objective: To ensure time taken to liquidate the investment position on the basis of liquidity in the secondary market
controls.control_description:
(1) 'Defeasance Period' means time taken to liquidate the investment position on
the basis of liquidity in the secondary market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to time taken to liquidate the investment position on the basis of liquidity in the secondary market

controls.control_objective: To ensure customers exercising their options for premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Embedded Options' means customers exercising their options for premature
closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to customers exercising their options for premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure measurement of mismatches between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets including off-balance sheet positions through a gap report gene
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Gap Analysis' means measurement of mismatches between rate sensitive
liabilities and rate sensitive assets including off-balance sheet positions
through a Gap Report generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets
and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturity
or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to measurement of mismatches between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets including off-balance sheet positions through a gap report gene

controls.control_objective: To ensure those liabilities and general obligations that are collateralised by legal rights to specifically designated assets owned by the borrowing institution
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) 'Secured Funding' means those liabilities and general obligations that are
collateralised by legal rights to specifically designated assets owned by the
borrowing institution.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to those liabilities and general obligations that are collateralised by legal rights to specifically designated assets owned by the borrowing institution

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluation of the financial position of a regulated entity (re) under a severe but plausible scenario to assist in decision making within the re
controls.control_description:
(6) 'Stress Test' means evaluation of the financial position of a regulated entity
(RE) under a severe but plausible scenario to assist in decision making within
the RE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluation of the financial position of a regulated entity (re) under a severe but plausible scenario to assist in decision making within the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure free of legal, regulatory, contractual, or other restrictions on the ability of the nbfc to liquidate, sell, transfer, or assign an asset
controls.control_description:
(7) 'Unencumbered' means free of legal, regulatory, contractual, or other
restrictions on the ability of the NBFC to liquidate, sell, transfer, or assign an
asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to free of legal, regulatory, contractual, or other restrictions on the ability of the nbfc to liquidate, sell, transfer, or assign an asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure nbfc's capacity to fund the increase in assets and meet both expected and unexpected cash and collateral obligations at reasonable cost and without in
controls.control_description:
(8) 'Liquidity' means NBFC's capacity to fund the increase in assets and meet
both expected and unexpected cash and collateral obligations at reasonable
cost and without incurring unacceptable losses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to nbfc's capacity to fund the increase in assets and meet both expected and unexpected cash and collateral obligations at reasonable cost and without in

controls.control_objective: To ensure inability of an nbfc to meet such obligations as they become due without adversely affecting the nbfc's financial condition
controls.control_description:
(9) 'Liquidity Risk' means inability of an NBFC to meet such obligations as they
become due without adversely affecting the NBFC's financial condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inability of an nbfc to meet such obligations as they become due without adversely affecting the nbfc's financial condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification
controls.control_description:
7 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations made
thereunder, or any statutory modification, or re-enactment thereto or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to nbfcs having asset size less than ₹100 crore as per their last audited balance sheet
controls.control_description:
Chapter II - Liquidity Risk Management Framework
Provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to NBFCs having asset size less than ₹100
crore as per their last audited Balance Sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to nbfcs having asset size less than ₹100 crore as per their last audited balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the overall responsibility for the implementation of alm systems
controls.control_description:
Role of the Board
8 The Board of Directors (Board) shall have the overall responsibility for the
implementation of ALM systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the overall responsibility for the implementation of alm systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be the duty of the board to set up an asset liability management committee (alco) headed by the ceo / md or the executive director (ed)
controls.control_description:
It shall also be the duty of the Board to set up an
Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) headed by the CEO / MD or the
Executive Director (ED).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be the duty of the board to set up an asset liability management committee (alco) headed by the ceo / md or the executive director (ed)

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a liquidity risk management framework that ensures the maintenance of adequate liquidity, including a cushion of unencumbered, high quality liqu
controls.control_description:
A.1 Approval of policies, limits, and reviews
9 The Board shall frame a liquidity risk management framework that ensures the
maintenance of adequate liquidity, including a cushion of unencumbered, high
quality liquid assets to withstand a range of stress events, including those involving
the loss or impairment of both unsecured and secured funding sources.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a liquidity risk management framework that ensures the maintenance of adequate liquidity, including a cushion of unencumbered, high quality liqu

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the internally defined limits for certain critical ratios used for liquidity risk management
controls.control_description:
10 The Board shall approve the internally defined limits for certain critical ratios used
for liquidity risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the internally defined limits for certain critical ratios used for liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the prudential limits on individual gaps for the prescribed maturity buckets for managing liquidity and interest rate risks
controls.control_description:
11 The Board / Management Committee shall approve the prudential limits on
individual Gaps for the prescribed maturity buckets for managing liquidity and
interest rate risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the prudential limits on individual gaps for the prescribed maturity buckets for managing liquidity and interest rate risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish an asset liability management (alm) system that offers a comprehensive and dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidi
controls.control_description:
Asset Liability Management Governance
12 An NBFC shall establish an Asset Liability Management (ALM) system that offers a
comprehensive and dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing
liquidity, interest rate, equity, and foreign exchange risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to establish an asset liability management (alm) system that offers a comprehensive and dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidi

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve the identification and assessment of various types of risks and enable dynamic adjustment of balance sheet items (assets and liabilities) to m
controls.control_description:
The system shall involve
the identification and assessment of various types of risks and enable dynamic
adjustment of balance sheet items (assets and liabilities) to manage these risks
effectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve the identification and assessment of various types of risks and enable dynamic adjustment of balance sheet items (assets and liabilities) to m

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the alm system based on following three pillars: (1) alm information systems comprising:
controls.control_description:
13 An NBFC shall implement the ALM system based on following three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems comprising:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the alm system based on following three pillars: (1) alm information systems comprising:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a management information system (mis) that provides timely and forward-looking information on the liquidity position of the nbfc and the
controls.control_description:
ALM Information Systems
14 An NBFC shall put in place a Management Information System (MIS) that provides
timely and forward-looking information on the liquidity position of the NBFC and the
Group to the Board and ALCO, both under normal and stress situations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a management information system (mis) that provides timely and forward-looking information on the liquidity position of the nbfc and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be capable of furnishing more granular and time-sensitive information during stress events
controls.control_description:
The MIS
shall be capable of furnishing more granular and time-sensitive information during
stress events.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be capable of furnishing more granular and time-sensitive information during stress events

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose, on a quarterly basis, the information specified in annex-i, on its official website
controls.control_description:
15 An NBFC shall disclose, on a quarterly basis, the information specified in Annex-I,
on its official website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose, on a quarterly basis, the information specified in annex-i, on its official website

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included as notes to accounts in the annual financial statements that enables market participants to make an informed judgment about the sound
controls.control_description:
The same shall also be included as Notes to Accounts in the
Annual Financial Statements that enables market participants to make an informed
judgment about the soundness of its liquidity risk management framework and
liquidity position.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be included as notes to accounts in the annual financial statements that enables market participants to make an informed judgment about the sound

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest with the board of an nbfc
controls.control_description:
ALM Organisation
16 The overall responsibility for implementation of ALM systems shall rest with the
Board of an NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest with the board of an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be involved in the process of identification, measurement, and mitigation of liquidity risks
controls.control_description:
In case of an NBFC having a Chief Risk Officer (CRO), the CRO
shall be involved in the process of identification, measurement, and mitigation of
liquidity risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be involved in the process of identification, measurement, and mitigation of liquidity risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up alco headed by the ceo / md or the ed
controls.control_description: 17 An NBFC shall set up ALCO headed by the CEO / MD or the ED.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up alco headed by the ceo / md or the ed

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the heads of investment, credit and strategy, treasury risk management, and economic research and other members as deemed suitable
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall
include the Heads of Investment, Credit and Strategy, Treasury Risk Management,
and Economic Research and other members as deemed suitable.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to include the heads of investment, credit and strategy, treasury risk management, and economic research and other members as deemed suitable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for ensuring adherence to the policies and limits set by the board as well as implementing the liquidity risk management strategy of th
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall
be responsible for ensuring adherence to the policies and limits set by the Board as
well as implementing the liquidity risk management strategy of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for ensuring adherence to the policies and limits set by the board as well as implementing the liquidity risk management strategy of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure also decide on the desired maturity profile and mix of incremental assets and liabilities, sale of assets as a source of funding, the structure, respo
controls.control_description:
The ALCO
shall also decide on the desired maturity profile and mix of incremental assets and
liabilities, sale of assets as a source of funding, the structure, responsibilities and
<image>
controls for managing liquidity risk, and overseeing the liquidity positions of all
branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also decide on the desired maturity profile and mix of incremental assets and liabilities, sale of assets as a source of funding, the structure, respo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the liquidity risk profile to the alco
controls.control_description:
18 The ALM Support Group consisting of the operating staff shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring, and reporting the liquidity risk profile to the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the liquidity risk profile to the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure have appropriate internal controls, systems, and procedures to ensure adherence to various liquidity risk management policies and procedures
controls.control_description:
19 An NBFC shall have appropriate internal controls, systems, and procedures to
ensure adherence to various liquidity risk management policies and procedures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have appropriate internal controls, systems, and procedures to ensure adherence to various liquidity risk management policies and procedures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to supervisory review
controls.control_description: These internal controls shall be subjected to supervisory review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to supervisory review

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an independent party regularly reviews and evaluates the various components of the nbfc's liquidity risk management process
controls.control_description:
Management
should ensure that an independent party regularly reviews and evaluates the various
components of the NBFC's liquidity risk management process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an independent party regularly reviews and evaluates the various components of the nbfc's liquidity risk management process

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the regional office of the department of supervision (dos) of the reserve bank under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the c
controls.control_description:
20 The policy note recorded by the NBFCs on treatment of the investment portfolio for
the purpose of ALM and approved by their Board / ALCO shall be forwarded to the
Regional Office of the Department of Supervision (DoS) of the Reserve Bank under
whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the regional office of the department of supervision (dos) of the reserve bank under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the c

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a liquidity risk management framework that ensures the maintenance of adequate liquidity, including a cushion of unencumbered, high quality liqu
controls.control_description:
Liquidity Risk Management
21 The Board of the NBFC shall frame a liquidity risk management framework that
ensures the maintenance of adequate liquidity, including a cushion of
unencumbered, high quality liquid assets to withstand a range of stress events,
including those involving the loss or impairment of both unsecured and secured
funding sources.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a liquidity risk management framework that ensures the maintenance of adequate liquidity, including a cushion of unencumbered, high quality liqu

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly mention the entity-level liquidity risk tolerance
controls.control_description: 22 The framework shall clearly mention the entity-level liquidity risk tolerance;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly mention the entity-level liquidity risk tolerance

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a sound process for identifying, measuring, monitoring, and controlling liquidity risk
controls.control_description:
23 An NBFC shall have a sound process for identifying, measuring, monitoring, and
controlling liquidity risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a sound process for identifying, measuring, monitoring, and controlling liquidity risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly articulate a liquidity risk tolerance that is appropriate for its business strategy and its role in the financial system
controls.control_description:
It should clearly articulate a liquidity risk tolerance that is
appropriate for its business strategy and its role in the financial system.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to clearly articulate a liquidity risk tolerance that is appropriate for its business strategy and its role in the financial system

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a strategy to manage liquidity risk in <image> accordance with such risk tolerance and ensure that the nbfc maintains sufficient liquidity
controls.control_description:
The Top
Management of the NBFC shall develop a strategy to manage liquidity risk in
<image>
accordance with such risk tolerance and ensure that the NBFC maintains sufficient
liquidity.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to develop a strategy to manage liquidity risk in <image> accordance with such risk tolerance and ensure that the nbfc maintains sufficient liquidity

controls.control_objective: To ensure endeavour to develop a process to quantify liquidity costs and benefits so that the same may be incorporated in the internal product pricing, performa
controls.control_description:
24 An NBFC shall endeavour to develop a process to quantify liquidity costs and
benefits so that the same may be incorporated in the internal product pricing,
performance measurement, and new product approval process for all material
business lines, products, and activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to endeavour to develop a process to quantify liquidity costs and benefits so that the same may be incorporated in the internal product pricing, performa

controls.control_objective: To ensure include a robust framework for comprehensive projection of cash flows arising from assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet items over an appropriat
controls.control_description:
25 The process for identification, measurement, monitoring, and controlling liquidity risk
should include a robust framework for comprehensive projection of cash flows
arising from assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet items over an appropriate set
of time horizons.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to include a robust framework for comprehensive projection of cash flows arising from assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet items over an appropriat

controls.control_objective: To ensure give particular importance to the management of liquidity risks relating to off-balance sheet exposures on account of special purpose vehicles, financ
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall give particular importance to the management of
liquidity risks relating to off-balance sheet exposures on account of special purpose
vehicles, financial derivatives, guarantees, and commitments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give particular importance to the management of liquidity risks relating to off-balance sheet exposures on account of special purpose vehicles, financ

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish a funding strategy that provides effective diversification in the sources and tenor of funding
controls.control_description:
26 An NBFC shall establish a funding strategy that provides effective diversification in
the sources and tenor of funding.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to establish a funding strategy that provides effective diversification in the sources and tenor of funding

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an ongoing presence in its chosen funding markets and strong relationships with fund providers to promote effective diversification of fundin
controls.control_description:
It shall maintain an ongoing presence in its chosen
funding markets and strong relationships with fund providers to promote effective
diversification of funding sources.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an ongoing presence in its chosen funding markets and strong relationships with fund providers to promote effective diversification of fundin

controls.control_objective: To ensure regularly assess its capacity to raise funds quickly from different sources
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall regularly assess its capacity to
raise funds quickly from different sources.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regularly assess its capacity to raise funds quickly from different sources

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take into account the qualitative dimension of the concentrated behaviour of deposit withdrawal (for deposit taking nbfc) in typical market condi
controls.control_description:
Funding strategy shall also take into
account the qualitative dimension of the concentrated behaviour of deposit
withdrawal (for deposit taking NBFC) in typical market conditions and over-reliance
on other funding sources arising out of unique business model.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take into account the qualitative dimension of the concentrated behaviour of deposit withdrawal (for deposit taking nbfc) in typical market condi

controls.control_objective: To ensure actively manage its collateral positions, differentiating between encumbered and unencumbered assets
controls.control_description:
27 An NBFC shall actively manage its collateral positions, differentiating between
encumbered and unencumbered assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to actively manage its collateral positions, differentiating between encumbered and unencumbered assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor the legal entity and physical location where collateral is held and how it may be mobilised in a timely manner
controls.control_description:
It shall monitor the legal entity and physical
location where collateral is held and how it may be mobilised in a timely manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor the legal entity and physical location where collateral is held and how it may be mobilised in a timely manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sufficient collateral to meet expected and unexpected borrowing needs and potential increases in margin requirements over different timeframes
controls.control_description:
An
NBFC shall have sufficient collateral to meet expected and unexpected borrowing
needs and potential increases in margin requirements over different timeframes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sufficient collateral to meet expected and unexpected borrowing needs and potential increases in margin requirements over different timeframes

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the stress testing forms an integral part of the overall governance and liquidity risk management
controls.control_description:
28 An NBFC shall ensure that the stress testing forms an integral part of the overall
governance and liquidity risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the stress testing forms an integral part of the overall governance and liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct stress tests on regular basis for a variety of short-term and protracted nbfc-specific and market- wide stress scenarios (individually and in
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall conduct stress tests on
regular basis for a variety of short-term and protracted NBFC-specific and market-
wide stress scenarios (individually and in combination).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct stress tests on regular basis for a variety of short-term and protracted nbfc-specific and market- wide stress scenarios (individually and in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be <image> taken into consideration so that the scenarios incorporate the major funding and market liquidity risks to which the nbfc is exposed
controls.control_description:
In designing liquidity stress
scenarios, the nature of the NBFC's business, activities, and vulnerabilities shall be
<image>
taken into consideration so that the scenarios incorporate the major funding and
market liquidity risks to which the NBFC is exposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be <image> taken into consideration so that the scenarios incorporate the major funding and market liquidity risks to which the nbfc is exposed

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a contingency funding plan (cfp) for responding to severe disruptions which may affect the nbfc's ability to fund its activities in a timely
controls.control_description:
29 An NBFC shall formulate a contingency funding plan (CFP) for responding to severe
disruptions which may affect the NBFC's ability to fund its activities in a timely
manner and at a reasonable cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate a contingency funding plan (cfp) for responding to severe disruptions which may affect the nbfc's ability to fund its activities in a timely

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain details of available / potential contingency funding sources and the amount / estimated amount which can be drawn from these sources, clear es
controls.control_description:
Contingency plans shall contain details of
available / potential contingency funding sources and the amount / estimated
amount which can be drawn from these sources, clear escalation / prioritisation
procedures detailing when and how each of the actions can and should be activated,
and the lead time needed to tap additional funds from each of the contingency
sources.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain details of available / potential contingency funding sources and the amount / estimated amount which can be drawn from these sources, clear es

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop and maintain liquidity management processes and funding programmes consistent with the complexity, risk profile, and scope of operations of th
controls.control_description:
30 With a view to recognizing the likely increased risk arising due to Intra-Group
transactions and exposures, the Group Chief Financial officer (CFO) shall develop
and maintain liquidity management processes and funding programmes consistent
with the complexity, risk profile, and scope of operations of the companies in the
Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop and maintain liquidity management processes and funding programmes consistent with the complexity, risk profile, and scope of operations of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account lending, investment, and other activities, and ensure that adequate liquidity is maintained at the group head level and at each cons
controls.control_description:
The Group liquidity risk management processes and funding programmes
shall take into account lending, investment, and other activities, and ensure that
adequate liquidity is maintained at the Group head level and at each constituent
entity within the group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account lending, investment, and other activities, and ensure that adequate liquidity is maintained at the group head level and at each cons

controls.control_objective: To ensure fully incorporate real and potential constraints, including legal and regulatory restrictions, on the transfer of funds among these entities and betwe
controls.control_description:
Processes and programmes shall fully incorporate real and
potential constraints, including legal and regulatory restrictions, on the transfer of
funds among these entities and between these entities and the principal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fully incorporate real and potential constraints, including legal and regulatory restrictions, on the transfer of funds among these entities and betwe

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the maturity ladder approach as the standard tool for measuring and managing net funding requirements
controls.control_description:
Maturity Profiling
31 An NBFC shall adopt the maturity ladder approach as the standard tool for
measuring and managing net funding requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the maturity ladder approach as the standard tool for measuring and managing net funding requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure calculate the cumulative surplus or deficit of funds at selected maturity buckets to assess the funding gaps and liquidity profile over varying time h
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall calculate the
cumulative surplus or deficit of funds at selected maturity buckets to assess the
funding gaps and liquidity profile over varying time horizons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to calculate the cumulative surplus or deficit of funds at selected maturity buckets to assess the funding gaps and liquidity profile over varying time h

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a maturity profile to measure the future cash flows in different time buckets, as per annex-ii
controls.control_description:
32 An NBFC shall prepare a Maturity Profile to measure the future cash flows in
different time buckets, as per Annex-II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a maturity profile to measure the future cash flows in different time buckets, as per annex-ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed as under: (1) 1 day to 7 days
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed as under: (1) 1 day to 7 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be broadly classified as 'mandatory securities' (under obligation of law) and other 'non-mandatory securities'
controls.control_description:
and
(10) Over 5 years
33 For an NBFC holding public deposit:
(1) Securities in their investment portfolio shall be broadly classified as 'mandatory
securities' (under obligation of law) and other 'non-mandatory securities';
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be broadly classified as 'mandatory securities' (under obligation of law) and other 'non-mandatory securities'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be categorised as non-mandatory
controls.control_description:
(2) Surplus securities (held over and above the requirement), shall be categorised
as non-mandatory.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be categorised as non-mandatory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be categorized as non-mandatory
controls.control_description:
34 For an NBFC not holding public deposit, all investments in securities shall be
categorized as non-mandatory.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be categorized as non-mandatory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) mandatory securities: deposit taking nbfc shall be permitted to place the mandatory securities in any time buckets as deemed suitable
controls.control_description:
35 The maturity profiling of such securities shall be as under:
(1) Mandatory securities: Deposit taking NBFC shall be permitted to place the
mandatory securities in any time buckets as deemed suitable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) mandatory securities: deposit taking nbfc shall be permitted to place the mandatory securities in any time buckets as deemed suitable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in any of the "1 day to 7 days, 8 days to 14 days, 15 days to 30 / 31 days (one month)", over one month and upto 2 months", and "over two mo
controls.control_description:
(i) The listed non-mandatory securities shall be placed in any of the "1 day to
7 days, 8 days to 14 days, 15 days to 30 / 31 days (One month)", Over one
month and upto 2 months", and "Over two months and upto 3 months"
buckets, depending upon the defeasance period proposed by the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in any of the "1 day to 7 days, 8 days to 14 days, 15 days to 30 / 31 days (one month)", over one month and upto 2 months", and "over two mo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the "over 5 years" buckets
controls.control_description:
(ii) The unlisted non-mandatory securities (e.g., equity shares, securities
without a fixed term of maturity) shall be placed in the "Over 5 years"
buckets, whereas unlisted non-mandatory securities having a fixed term of
maturity may be placed in the relevant time bucket as per residual maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the "over 5 years" buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked to market for the purpose of the alm system
controls.control_description:
36 The mandatory securities and listed securities shall be marked to market for the
purpose of the ALM system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be marked to market for the purpose of the alm system

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued as per the reserve <image> bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio)
controls.control_description:
Unlisted securities shall be valued as per the Reserve
<image>
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued as per the reserve <image> bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio)

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the concept of 'trading book' for maturity profiling of their investment portfolio, which is as follows: (1) the composition and volume are cle
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the concept of 'trading book' for maturity profiling of their investment portfolio, which is as follows: (1) the composition and volume are cle

controls.control_objective: To ensure show the trading securities under "1 day to 30 / 31 days (one month)", over one month and upto 2 months", and "over two months and upto 3 months" buck
controls.control_description:
38 An NBFC which maintains such Trading Book and complies with the above criteria
shall show the trading securities under "1 day to 30 / 31 days (One month)", Over
one month and upto 2 months", and "Over two months and upto 3 months" buckets
on the basis of the defeasance periods.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show the trading securities under "1 day to 30 / 31 days (one month)", over one month and upto 2 months", and "over two months and upto 3 months" buck

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding/ defeasance period, and cut loss of the trading book
controls.control_description:
The Board / ALCO of the NBFC shall
approve the volume, composition, holding/ defeasance period, and cut loss of the
Trading Book.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding/ defeasance period, and cut loss of the trading book

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be classified as short-term and long-term investments as required under reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification
controls.control_description:
The remaining investments shall also be classified as short-term and
long-term investments as required under Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment
Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be classified as short-term and long-term investments as required under reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor mismatches arising from cash inflows and outflows, including mismatches upto one year, which are early warning signals of impending liquidity
controls.control_description:
Liquidity Mismatch Management
39 Within each time bucket, an NBFC shall monitor mismatches arising from cash
inflows and outflows, including mismatches upto one year, which are early warning
signals of impending liquidity problems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor mismatches arising from cash inflows and outflows, including mismatches upto one year, which are early warning signals of impending liquidity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on short-term mismatches viz
controls.control_description:
The primary focus shall be on short-term
mismatches viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on short-term mismatches viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent in the 1-7 days bucket, 10 per cent in 8-14 days bucket, and 20 per cent in 15-30 days bucket, measured as percentage of cumulative
controls.control_description:
The net cumulative negative mismatches in the
Structural Liquidity Statement (SLS) (refer Annex IV) in the maturity buckets shall
not exceed 10 per cent in the 1-7 days bucket, 10 per cent in 8-14 days bucket, and
20 per cent in 15-30 days bucket, measured as percentage of cumulative cash
outflows in the respective time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent in the 1-7 days bucket, 10 per cent in 8-14 days bucket, and 20 per cent in 15-30 days bucket, measured as percentage of cumulative

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all other time buckets upto 1 year by establishing internal prudential limits with the approv
controls.control_description:
40 An NBFC shall monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all other
time buckets upto 1 year by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval
<image>
of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all other time buckets upto 1 year by establishing internal prudential limits with the approv

controls.control_objective: To ensure also adopt the above cumulative mismatch limits in the sls for consolidated operations
controls.control_description:
It shall also adopt the above cumulative mismatch limits in the SLS for
consolidated operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also adopt the above cumulative mismatch limits in the sls for consolidated operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared by placing all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows
controls.control_description:
41 The SLS shall be prepared by placing all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity
ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared by placing all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow
controls.control_description:
A maturing liability shall be a
cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure estimate its short-term liquidity profile over a time horizon spanning from 1 day to 6 months, based on business projections and other commitments for
controls.control_description:
42 An NBFC shall estimate its short-term liquidity profile over a time horizon spanning
from 1 day to 6 months, based on business projections and other commitments for
short term liquidity planning and monitoring on dynamic basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to estimate its short-term liquidity profile over a time horizon spanning from 1 day to 6 months, based on business projections and other commitments for

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a 'stock' approach to liquidity risk measurement and monitor certain critical ratios related to liquidity risk management by putting in place in
controls.control_description:
Liquidity Risk Measurement - Stock Approach
43 An NBFC shall adopt a 'stock' approach to liquidity risk measurement and monitor
certain critical ratios related to liquidity risk management by putting in place internally
defined limits, as approved by its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a 'stock' approach to liquidity risk measurement and monitor certain critical ratios related to liquidity risk management by putting in place in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on an nbfc's liquidity risk management capabilities, experience, and profile
controls.control_description:
The ratios and internal limits shall be based
on an NBFC's liquidity risk management capabilities, experience, and profile.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on an nbfc's liquidity risk management capabilities, experience, and profile

controls.control_objective: To ensure recognise the liquidity risk arising out of such exposures and develop suitable preparedness for managing the risk
controls.control_description:
Currency Risk Management
44 The Board of an NBFC having foreign assets or liabilities on its Balance Sheet shall
recognise the liquidity risk arising out of such exposures and develop suitable
preparedness for managing the risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recognise the liquidity risk arising out of such exposures and develop suitable preparedness for managing the risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement appropriate systems to hedge interest rate risk (irr) arising from fluctuations in market interest rates
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall implement appropriate systems to
hedge Interest Rate Risk (IRR) arising from fluctuations in market interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement appropriate systems to hedge interest rate risk (irr) arising from fluctuations in market interest rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure use tga to measure the irr
controls.control_description: 46 Initially, an NBFC may use TGA to measure the IRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use tga to measure the irr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , over time, adopt modern techniques for measurement of irr, including duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk (var), as it acquires adeq
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall, over time,
adopt modern techniques for measurement of IRR, including Duration Gap Analysis,
Simulation, and Value at Risk (VaR), as it acquires adequate expertise and
sophistication in developing and managing MIS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , over time, adopt modern techniques for measurement of irr, including duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk (var), as it acquires adeq

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet positions)
controls.control_description:
Earnings Perspective: TGA
47 The Gap or Mismatch risk measurement: An NBFC shall measure Gap or Mismatch
risk by calculating Gaps between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets
(including off-balance sheet positions) over different time intervals as at a given
date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet positions)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered rate sensitive if: (1) there is a cash flow within the time interval under consideration
controls.control_description:
An asset or liability shall be considered rate sensitive if:
(1) There is a cash flow within the time interval under consideration;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered rate sensitive if: (1) there is a cash flow within the time interval under consideration

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the gap report by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturit
controls.control_description:
48 An NBFC shall prepare the Gap Report by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets,
and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturity or
next repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to prepare the gap report by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as interest rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
All investments, advances, deposits,
borrowings, and purchased funds that mature / reprice within a specified timeframe
shall be treated as interest rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as interest rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be classified as rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
Any principal repayment of loan, including
final principal payment and interim instalment, expected to be received within the
time horizon, shall also be classified as rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be classified as rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as rate sensitive at the time of repricing
controls.control_description:
Interest rate bearing assets
and liabilities that vary with a reference rate and reprice at pre-determined intervals
shall be treated as rate sensitive at the time of repricing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as rate sensitive at the time of repricing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
While the interest rates on
term deposits are fixed during their currency, the tranches of advances portfolio with
floating rates shall be treated as rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify the gaps in the following time buckets: (1) 1 day to 7 days
controls.control_description:
49 An NBFC shall identify the Gaps in the following time buckets:
(1) 1 day to 7 days;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify the gaps in the following time buckets: (1) 1 day to 7 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify the various items of rate sensitive assets and liabilities and off-balance sheet items as explained in annex-iii and prepare a statement of i
controls.control_description:
50 An NBFC shall classify the various items of rate sensitive assets and liabilities and
off-balance sheet items as explained in Annex-III and prepare a statement of Interest
Rate Sensitivity (refer Annex IV for format)
51 The positive Gap (RSA > RSL) indicates potential benefit from rising interest rates,
while a negative gap (RSA < RSL) indicates potential benefit from declining interest
rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify the various items of rate sensitive assets and liabilities and off-balance sheet items as explained in annex-iii and prepare a statement of i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used as a measure of interest rate sensitivity
controls.control_description: Gap reports shall be used as a measure of interest rate sensitivity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used as a measure of interest rate sensitivity

controls.control_objective: To ensure set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / management committee
controls.control_description:
52 An NBFC shall set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the Board
/ Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a relationship with the total assets, earning assets, or equity
controls.control_description:
The prudential limits shall have a relationship with the
Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a relationship with the total assets, earning assets, or equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute earnings at risk (ear) in terms of net interest margin (nim) based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the ap
controls.control_description:
An NBFC may compute Earnings at Risk
(EaR) in terms of Net Interest Margin (NIM) based on its views on interest rate
movements and fix a prudent level with the approval of the Board / Management
Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute earnings at risk (ear) in terms of net interest margin (nim) based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the benchmarks as indicated in annex-ii and iii
controls.control_description:
53 The classification of various components of assets and liabilities into different time
buckets for preparation of Gap reports (Liquidity and Interest Rate Sensitivity) shall
follow the benchmarks as indicated in Annex-II and III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the benchmarks as indicated in annex-ii and iii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the regional office of dos, rbi, under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is located
controls.control_description:
A copy of the note approved by the ALCO / Board shall be sent
to the Regional Office of DoS, RBI, under whose jurisdiction the registered office of
the company is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the regional office of dos, rbi, under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is located

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain 'what if scenario' analysis under <image> various assumed conditions and the contingency plans to face various adverse developments
controls.control_description:
These notes may contain 'what if scenario' analysis under
<image>
various assumed conditions and the contingency plans to face various adverse
developments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain 'what if scenario' analysis under <image> various assumed conditions and the contingency plans to face various adverse developments

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate in its risk management framework, the potential impact of premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances, which are no
controls.control_description:
55 An NBFC shall incorporate in its risk management framework, the potential impact
of premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances, which are
not captured under the current framework, but may significantly affect the liquidity
and interest rate risk profile, especially during periods of market volatility.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to incorporate in its risk management framework, the potential impact of premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances, which are no

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish a mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis, to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-balan
controls.control_description:
An NBFC
shall establish a mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural
analysis, to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet
items in response to changes in market variables, including interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish a mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis, to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-balan

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the following returns: (1) short term dynamic liquidity (stdl) return (dnbs04a) at quarterly interval
controls.control_description:
Regulatory Reporting and Periodicity
57 An NBFC shall submit the following returns:
(1) Short Term Dynamic Liquidity (STDL) return (DNBS04A) at quarterly interval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the following returns: (1) short term dynamic liquidity (stdl) return (dnbs04a) at quarterly interval

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to reserve bank of india (filing of supervisory returns) directions, 2024 for submission timelines for above regulatory returns
controls.control_description:
58 An NBFC shall refer to Reserve Bank of India (Filing of Supervisory Returns)
Directions, 2024 for submission timelines for above regulatory returns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to reserve bank of india (filing of supervisory returns) directions, 2024 for submission timelines for above regulatory returns

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to non-deposit taking nbfcs with asset size below ₹5000 crore
controls.control_description:
Chapter III - Liquidity Coverage Ratio
Provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to non-deposit taking NBFCs with asset size
below ₹5000 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to non-deposit taking nbfcs with asset size below ₹5000 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an adequate level of unencumbered hqla that can be converted into cash to meet its liquidity needs for a 30 calendar-day time horizon under a
controls.control_description:
Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR)
60 An NBFC shall maintain an adequate level of unencumbered HQLA that can be
converted into cash to meet its liquidity needs for a 30 calendar-day time horizon
under a significantly severe liquidity stress scenario as specified in the Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an adequate level of unencumbered hqla that can be converted into cash to meet its liquidity needs for a 30 calendar-day time horizon under a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as: stock of high quality liquid assets (hqla) total net cash outflows over the next 30 calendar days 62 an nbfc shall maintain lcr of m
controls.control_description:
61 LCR shall be calculated as:
Stock of High Quality Liquid Assets (HQLA) Total net cash outflows over the next 30 calendar days
62 An NBFC shall maintain LCR of minimum 100 per cent (i.e., the stock of HQLA shall
at least equal total net cash outflows) on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as: stock of high quality liquid assets (hqla) total net cash outflows over the next 30 calendar days 62 an nbfc shall maintain lcr of m

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to use its stock of hqla during a period of financial stress, thereby allowing lcr to fall below 100 per cent
controls.control_description:
Provided that an NBFC shall have the option to use its stock of HQLA during a period
of financial stress, thereby allowing LCR to fall below 100 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to use its stock of hqla during a period of financial stress, thereby allowing lcr to fall below 100 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately report to the dos, rbi, such use of stock of hqla during a period of financial stress along with reasons for such usage and corrective ste
controls.control_description:
Provided further that an NBFC shall immediately report to the DoS, RBI, such use
of stock of HQLA during a period of financial stress along with reasons for such
usage and corrective steps initiated to rectify the situation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately report to the dos, rbi, such use of stock of hqla during a period of financial stress along with reasons for such usage and corrective ste

controls.control_objective: To ensure be unencumbered
controls.control_description: Such assets shall be unencumbered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be unencumbered

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an adequate level of unencumbered hqla that can be converted into cash to meet its liquidity needs for a 30 calendar-day time horizon under a
controls.control_description:
65 An NBFC shall maintain an adequate level of unencumbered HQLA that can be
converted into cash to meet its liquidity needs for a 30 calendar-day time horizon
under a significantly severe liquidity stress scenario, as specified in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an adequate level of unencumbered hqla that can be converted into cash to meet its liquidity needs for a 30 calendar-day time horizon under a

controls.control_objective: To ensure possess the following characteristics: (1) fundamental characteristics: these include low credit and market risk
controls.control_description:
66 HQLA shall possess the following characteristics:
(1) Fundamental Characteristics: These include low credit and market risk;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to possess the following characteristics: (1) fundamental characteristics: these include low credit and market risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at an amount no greater than their current market value
controls.control_description:
Such assets shall be valued at an
amount no greater than their current market value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at an amount no greater than their current market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied while calculating the hqla for the purpose of calculation of lcr
controls.control_description:
Depending upon the nature of
assets, they have been assigned different haircuts as indicated below, which shall
be applied while calculating the HQLA for the purpose of calculation of LCR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied while calculating the hqla for the purpose of calculation of lcr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued by a bank / financial institution / nbfc or any of its affiliate entities and are limited to the following: (1) marketable securities repres
controls.control_description:
69 Assets to be considered for HQLA with a minimum haircut of 15 per cent shall not
be issued by a bank / financial institution / NBFC or any of its affiliate entities and
are limited to the following:
(1) Marketable securities representing claims on or claims guaranteed by
sovereigns, Public Sector Entities (PSEs), or multilateral development banks
that are assigned a 20 per cent risk weight by banks under standardised
approach for credit risk;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by a bank / financial institution / nbfc or any of its affiliate entities and are limited to the following: (1) marketable securities repres

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued by a bank / financial institution / nbfc or any of its affiliate entities and are limited to the following: (1) marketable securities repres
controls.control_description:
70 Asset to be considered for HQLA with a minimum haircut of 50 per cent shall not be
issued by a bank / financial institution / NBFC or any of its affiliate entities and are
limited to the following:
(1) Marketable securities representing claims on or claims guaranteed by
sovereigns having risk weights higher than 20 per cent but not higher than 50
per cent, i.e., they should have a credit rating not lower than BBB- as
prescribed for banks in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by a bank / financial institution / nbfc or any of its affiliate entities and are limited to the following: (1) marketable securities repres

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as hqla only to the extent of 80 per cent of the required holding
controls.control_description:
71 For a deposit taking NBFC, unencumbered approved securities held as per the
provisions of Section 45IB of the RBI Act, 1934 (Section 29B of NHB Act, 1987 in
case of a deposit taking HFC), shall be reckoned as HQLA only to the extent of 80
per cent of the required holding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as hqla only to the extent of 80 per cent of the required holding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following operational requirements: (1) must be available at all times to be converted into cash
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following operational requirements: (1) must be available at all times to be converted into cash

controls.control_objective: To ensure be co-mingled / used as hedges on trading position
controls.control_description: (3) Shall not be co-mingled / used as hedges on trading position;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be co-mingled / used as hedges on trading position

controls.control_objective: To ensure be managed with sole intent for use as a source of contingent funds
controls.control_description: (4) Shall be managed with sole intent for use as a source of contingent funds;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be managed with sole intent for use as a source of contingent funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under the control of specific function/s charged with managing liquidity risk of the bank, such as the alco
controls.control_description:
and
(5) Shall be under the control of specific function/s charged with managing liquidity
risk of the bank, such as the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under the control of specific function/s charged with managing liquidity risk of the bank, such as the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically monetize a proportion of assets through repo or outright sale to test the saleability of these assets and to minimize the risk of negativ
controls.control_description:
73 An NBFC shall periodically monetize a proportion of assets through repo or outright
sale to test the saleability of these assets and to minimize the risk of negative
<image>
signalling during period of stress.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically monetize a proportion of assets through repo or outright sale to test the saleability of these assets and to minimize the risk of negativ

controls.control_objective: To ensure also maintain liquid assets consistent with distribution of its liquidity needs by currency
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall also maintain liquid assets
consistent with distribution of its liquidity needs by currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also maintain liquid assets consistent with distribution of its liquidity needs by currency

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to keep the asset in its stock of liquid assets for an additional 30 calendar days in order to have sufficient time to adjust the stock / r
controls.control_description:
74 If an eligible liquid asset becomes ineligible (e.g., due to downgrade), an NBFC shall
be allowed to keep the asset in its stock of liquid assets for an additional 30 calendar
days in order to have sufficient time to adjust the stock / replace the asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to keep the asset in its stock of liquid assets for an additional 30 calendar days in order to have sufficient time to adjust the stock / r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed by assigning a predefined stress percentage to the overall cash inflows and cash outflows
controls.control_description:
76 Stressed cash flows shall be computed by assigning a predefined stress percentage
to the overall cash inflows and cash outflows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed by assigning a predefined stress percentage to the overall cash inflows and cash outflows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated by multiplying the outstanding balances of various categories or types of liabilities and off-balance sheet commitments by 115 per cent
controls.control_description:
Total expected cash outflows
(stressed outflows) shall be calculated by multiplying the outstanding balances of
various categories or types of liabilities and off-balance sheet commitments by 115
per cent (15 per cent being the rate at which they are expected to run off further or
be drawn down).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated by multiplying the outstanding balances of various categories or types of liabilities and off-balance sheet commitments by 115 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated by multiplying the outstanding balances of various categories of contractual receivables by 75 per cent (25 per cent being the rate at w
controls.control_description:
Total expected cash inflows (stressed inflows) shall be calculated
by multiplying the outstanding balances of various categories of contractual
receivables by 75 per cent (25 per cent being the rate at which they are expected to
under-flow).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated by multiplying the outstanding balances of various categories of contractual receivables by 75 per cent (25 per cent being the rate at w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to an aggregate cap of 75 per cent of total expected cash outflows
controls.control_description:
However, total cash inflows shall be subjected to an aggregate cap of
75 per cent of total expected cash outflows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to an aggregate cap of 75 per cent of total expected cash outflows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: total net cash outflows over the next 30 days = stressed outflows - min (stressed inflows
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: total net cash outflows over the next 30 days = stressed outflows - min (stressed inflows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to double count items
controls.control_description: 77 An NBFC shall not be permitted to double count items.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to double count items

controls.control_objective: To ensure be simultaneously counted as cash inflows (i
controls.control_description:
If an asset is included in the
'stock of HQLA' (i.e., the numerator), the associated cash inflows from that asset
shall not be simultaneously counted as cash inflows (i.e., part of the denominator).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be simultaneously counted as cash inflows (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure to disclose information on its lcr every quarter
controls.control_description:
LCR Disclosure
78 An NBFC is required to disclose information on its LCR every quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to disclose information on its lcr every quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose information on lcr in accordance with reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclos
controls.control_description:
Further, an
NBFC shall disclose information on LCR in accordance with Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and
Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose information on lcr in accordance with reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclos

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
80 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
81 The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
82 For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the time-bucket as per purpose / end-use specified
controls.control_description: However, if such gifts, grants, etc., are tied to specific end-use, then these may be slotted in the time-bucket as per purpose / end-use specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the time-bucket as per purpose / end-use specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per their residual maturity c) commercial papers as per the residual maturity 5
controls.control_description: b) Inter Corporate Deposits These, being institutional / wholesale deposits, shall be slotted as per their residual maturity c) Commercial Papers As per the residual maturity 5.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per their residual maturity c) commercial papers as per the residual maturity 5
