controls.control_objective: To ensure be netted out from the gross amount of the npa portfolio and the net amount of npas be shown as an item under inflows in stipulated time-buckets
controls.control_description: e) Provisions for NPAs The amount of provision may be netted out from the gross amount of the NPA portfolio and the net amount of NPAs be shown as an item under inflows in stipulated time-buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be netted out from the gross amount of the npa portfolio and the net amount of npas be shown as an item under inflows in stipulated time-buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be netted from the gross value of investments portfolio and the net investments be shown as inflow in the prescribed time-slots
controls.control_description: f) Provision for Investments portfolio The amount may be netted from the gross value of investments portfolio and the net investments be shown as inflow in the prescribed time-slots.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be netted from the gross value of investments portfolio and the net investments be shown as inflow in the prescribed time-slots

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown on "over 5 years" time bucket
controls.control_description: In case provisions are not held security-wise, the provision may be shown on "over 5 years" time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown on "over 5 years" time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in time buckets of '1 day 7 days, 8 days <image> open ended mutual funds and other investments
controls.control_description:
(i) Shares classified as 'current' investments representing trading book of the NBFC may be shown in time buckets of '1 day 7 days, 8 days
<image>
open ended mutual funds and other investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in time buckets of '1 day 7 days, 8 days <image> open ended mutual funds and other investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept in over '5 years' time' bucket
controls.control_description:
(ii) Shares classified as 'long term
investments may be kept in over '5 years' time' bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept in over '5 years' time' bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the relative time bucket keeping in view the pace of project implementation / time-overrun, etc
controls.control_description: However, the shares of the assisted units / companies acquired as part of the initial financing package, may be slotted in the relative time bucket keeping in view the pace of project implementation / time-overrun, etc., and the resultant likely timeframe for divesting such shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the relative time bucket keeping in view the pace of project implementation / time-overrun, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flows as stipulated in the original / revised repayment schedule
controls.control_description: b) Term loans (rupee loans only) The cash inflows on account of the interest and principal of the loan may be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flows as stipulated in the original / revised repayment schedule.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flows as stipulated in the original / revised repayment schedule

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown net of the provisions, interest suspense held) a) sub-standard i) all overdues and instalments in the 3 to 5 year time-bucket
controls.control_description:
Non-performing loans (May be shown net of the provisions, interest suspense held)
a) Sub-standard

i) All overdues and instalments
In the 3 to 5 year time-bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown net of the provisions, interest suspense held) a) sub-standard i) all overdues and instalments in the 3 to 5 year time-bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flow
controls.control_description: Assets on lease Cash flows from the lease transaction may be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flow

controls.control_objective: To ensure be estimated and this amount could be distributed in various time buckets on judgmental basis
controls.control_description:
Contingent liabilities

(a) Letters of credit / guarantees (outflow
Based on the past trend analysis of the devolvement vis-a-vis the outstanding amount of guarantees (net of margins held), the likely devolvement shall be estimated and this amount could be distributed in various time buckets on judgmental basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be estimated and this amount could be distributed in various time buckets on judgmental basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates
controls.control_description: The assets created out of devolvement may be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in a time bucket corresponding to timing of such cash flows
controls.control_description:
Note:
Any event-specific cash flows (e.g., outflow due to wage settlement arrears, capital expenses, income tax refunds, etc.) shall be shown in a time bucket corresponding to timing of such cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in a time bucket corresponding to timing of such cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as below:
controls.control_description:
(i) All overdue liabilities be shown in the 1 to 7 days and 8-14 days time buckets based on behavioural estimates (ii) Overdue receivables on account of interest and instalments of standard loans
/ hire purchase assets / leased rentals shall be slotted as below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the repricing dates
controls.control_description: reprice on the roll-over / repricing date, shall be slotted in respective time buckets as per the repricing dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the repricing dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description: To be slotted in respective time buckets as per residual maturity or as per residual lock-in period, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the earliest / shortest time bucket
controls.control_description: The prematurely withdrawable deposits with no lock-in period or past such lock-in period, shall be slotted in the earliest / shortest time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the earliest / shortest time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown, net of provisions made, in: i) 3-5 year bucket - if sub-standard norms applied
controls.control_description:
However, the bonds / debentures valued by applying NPA norms due to non-servicing of interest, shall be shown, net of provisions made, in:
i) 3-5 year bucket - if sub-standard norms applied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown, net of provisions made, in: i) 3-5 year bucket - if sub-standard norms applied

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in time buckets which correspond to the time <image> taken by nbfc to effect changes in their plr in response to market interest rates
controls.control_description:
The amount of term loans shall be slotted in time buckets which correspond to the time
<image>
taken by NBFC to effect changes in their PLR in response to market interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in time buckets which correspond to the time <image> taken by nbfc to effect changes in their plr in response to market interest rates
